heading: Rights of several roads through canyons
label: 316 Rights of several roads through canyons
text: The provisions of section 935 of title 43 relating to the rights of several railroads through any canyon, pass, or defile are extended and made applicable to rights of way granted under sections 312 to 318 of this title and to railroad companies obtaining such rights of way.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , , , effective on and after , insofar as applicable to the issuance of rights-of-way over, under, and through the public lands and lands in the National Forest System.Section 935 of title 43Pub.
